auth.schoolOptionalHint: Filling this helps with class rankings and stats; you can also complete it later in the onboarding.
auth.classOptionalHint: You can skip this for now; we'll guide you to select/create school and class after login.
auth.schoolPlaceholder: Enter to create a new school (optional)
auth.newSchoolNote: You can either select an existing school or enter a new one which will be created on registration.
auth.schoolEditDescription: Select an existing school or type a new school name; once verified it will be saved to the directory automatically.
auth.schoolSearchPlaceholder: Search for a school or enter a new name
auth.schoolInputHint: Prefer choosing from the list to keep data consistent, or type a new name and we'll create it after verification.
auth.schoolNoResults: No matching schools. Enter a new name above.
auth.turnstileNotice: Complete the verification challenge to prevent automated abuse.
auth.schoolCreatePending: New school submitted; it will be created after verification.
auth.schoolCreateSuccess: New school created and linked to your account.
auth.schoolCreateFailed: Failed to create school. Please try again later.
auth.schoolPendingApproval: School submission is awaiting review and may take up to 24 hours.
auth.passkeySupportUnavailable: Passkey sign-in is not available on this device or in this context.
auth.passkeySupportReasonInsecureContext: This page is not running in a secure context. Use HTTPS or localhost.
auth.passkeySupportReasonMissingWebauthn: This browser does not expose WebAuthn support.
auth.passkeySupportReasonMissingCredentialsAp: This browser does not expose the Credentials Management API.
auth.fillInformation: Please fill in the information below to complete registration
auth.enterEmailForReset: Enter your email address and we'll send a reset link
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link
auth.agreementText: By signing up, you agree to our
auth.loginFailed: Login failed, please check your username and password
auth.registerFailed: Registration failed, please try again later
auth.resetEmailSent: Reset email sent. Please check your inbox
auth.resetEmailFailed: Failed to send reset email, please try again later

validation.usernamePattern: Username can only contain letters, numbers and underscores

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Join CarbonTrack and start your environmental journey

verification.title: Verify your email
verification.description: We've sent a verification code to {{email}}. Enter the code below or click the link in the email.
verification.checkInbox: We've sent a verification email to {{email}}. Please check your inbox.
verification.codePattern: The verification code should be 6 digits.
verification.codeFailed: Verification code is invalid or has expired.
verification.tokenFailed: The verification link is invalid or has expired.
verification.turnstileRequired: Please complete the human verification challenge.
verification.resendCountdown: You can request a new code in {{seconds}}s
verification.helper: Still no email? Check your spam folder or request a new code.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link
resetPassword.instructions: Your new password must be at least 8 characters long.
resetPassword.tokenMissing: The reset link is invalid or has already been used.
resetPassword.success: Password reset successful. Redirecting you to sign in...
resetPassword.failed: Unable to reset password. Please request a new link or try again later.

errors.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Incorrect username or password. Please try again.
errors.LOGIN_FAILED: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again later.
errors.WEBAUTHN_LIBRARY_UNAVAILABLE: The server cannot verify passkeys right now. Please try again later.
errors.PASSKEY_AUTHENTICATION_OPTIONS_FAILED: Unable to start passkey sign-in right now. Please try again.
errors.PASSKEY_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED: Passkey sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.CHALLENGE_ID_REQUIRED: The passkey sign-in request is incomplete. Please start again.
errors.CHALLENGE_NOT_FOUND: This passkey sign-in request was not found or has expired. Please try again.
errors.PASSKEY_CHALLENGE_CONSUMED: This passkey sign-in request has already expired. Please start again.
errors.PASSKEY_NOT_FOUND: We could not find that passkey. Make sure you are using a passkey registered for this account.
errors.PASSKEY_ACCOUNT_MISMATCH: This passkey does not match the account you entered.
errors.PASSKEY_TOUCH_FAILED: Sign-in succeeded, but the passkey state could not be updated. Please try again.
errors.PASSKEY_USER_NOT_FOUND: The account linked to this passkey could not be found.
errors.INVALID_CREDENTIAL: The passkey response is invalid. Please try again.
errors.MISSING_CREDENTIAL_ID: The passkey response did not include a credential ID. Please try again.
errors.INVALID_USER: The current account data is invalid and passkey sign-in could not be completed.
errors.USER_UUID_REQUIRED: This account is missing required identity data for passkey sign-in.
errors.INVALID_USER_HANDLE: The passkey returned a user handle that does not match this account.
errors.INVALID_SIGNATURE: Passkey signature verification failed. Try again or sign in with your password.
errors.SIGN_COUNT_REPLAY: An unsafe passkey counter change was detected, so this sign-in was rejected.
errors.INVALID_AUTHENTICATION_RESPONSE: The passkey authentication response is invalid. Please try again.
errors.INVALID_CEREMONY_TYPE: The passkey ceremony type is invalid. Please start sign-in again.
errors.INVALID_CHALLENGE: The passkey challenge verification failed. Please start sign-in again.
errors.INVALID_ORIGIN: This page origin is not allowed for passkey sign-in. Please use the official site.
errors.CROSS_ORIGIN_NOT_ALLOWED: Cross-origin passkey responses are not allowed. Please try again on this site.
errors.INVALID_RP_ID: The passkey relying party ID does not match this site.
errors.USER_PRESENCE_REQUIRED: Your device must confirm user presence before passkey sign-in can continue.
errors.USER_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED: Complete device verification before signing in with a passkey.

auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
